description_long: This apartment building consists of three long, parallel structures with a modern, modular design. The facades are characterized by repeating geometric patterns, with rows of windows and subtle green accents on the rooftops and ledges. The buildings are primarily dark gray and black, with lighter gray highlights and green details that suggest rooftop gardens or eco-friendly features. The windows are symmetrically arranged, and the overall form is rectilinear and streamlined, giving a sense of urban density. The structures appear to be multi-story, with flat roofs and no visible balconies. The entrances are not prominently featured, but the ground level includes what appear to be multiple access points.
description: A set of three modern, multi-story apartment buildings with dark facades, green rooftop accents, and symmetrical window arrangements. The design is modular and urban, with flat roofs and no visible balconies.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the three parallel apartment buildings, highlighting the repeating window patterns and green rooftop accents.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the length of each building and the separation between the three structures, with visible window rows and green details.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the modular window arrangement and the flat, green-accented rooftops.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the length and separation of the buildings, with clear visibility of the window rows and rooftop features.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in evenly spaced, horizontal rows across each building, creating a highly symmetrical and repetitive pattern along the facades.
